specific_question: How much of the 2024 revenue increase has the sales team attributed to the introduction of the new Lee's Advisor AI agent on the website, allowing customers to ask specific product questions?
answer: The sales team has calculated that approximately 15% of the increase in 2024 revenue was thanks to the introduction of the new AI agent called Lee's Advisor to the website.
